subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest towards My direction, who hast turned thy face unto My countenance, and who calleth upon My Name! Hearken thou unto the call from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی شطری و المتوجه الی وجهی و المنادی باسمی ان استمع الندآء من
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
